title: SiC Device Research and Pilot at KACST-SSIH
entry_mechanism: GADD-KACST-SSIH Silicon Carbide power device research programme with international foundry partnership
executive_summary:
Silicon Carbide (SiC) power semiconductors are the enabling technology for electric vehicles, industrial power conversion, solar inverters, and defence power electronics — operating at higher voltages, temperatures, and efficiencies than silicon-based devices. SiC devices are the fastest-growing semiconductor category (29.4% CAGR) and Saudi Arabia's automotive (AU programme), renewable energy, and defence programmes all create demand for SiC power devices.

Node SC-4 targets Phase II Saudi SiC device research and pilot fabrication at KACST-SSIH. Phase I activities (SC-1 chip design, SC-2 electronic chemicals, SC-3 HPA ceramics) establish the enabling infrastructure. Phase II SiC research builds on this foundation to create Saudi SiC device design capability and a pilot fabrication line.

SiC substrate manufacturing (Wolfspeed, SICC, STMicroelectronics) is a strategic bottleneck — Saudi Arabia's natural silicon carbide mineral resources (quartz + carbon → SiC at SABIC) and HPA ceramics from SC-3 create potential feedstock advantages for SiC crystal growth. The SiC substrate → SiC device → Saudi EV power electronics cascade is the semiconductor equivalent of the MA-1 → CA-2 → SS-1 composites cascade.

companies.name: STMicroelectronics
companies.rationale: ST is the market leader in automotive SiC devices with active GCC market relationships. Non-US European technology with industrial partnership experience.

companies.name: Wolfspeed
companies.rationale: Wolfspeed produces the world's leading SiC substrates. Technology access for Saudi SiC research programme.

companies.name: Infineon Technologies
companies.rationale: Infineon is a leading SiC power device manufacturer with active Gulf industrial relationships.

companies.name: onsemi
companies.rationale: onsemi is the fastest-growing SiC device company with automotive and industrial focus.

companies.name: SICC (China)
companies.rationale: SICC produces SiC substrates and offers more accessible technology partnership than US suppliers.

partners.name: GADD / SSIH
partners.current: Phase I SC-1 chip design infrastructure
partners.upgrade: GADD SiC research programme at KACST-SSIH; STMicroelectronics research partnership; SiC crystal growth laboratory; 20 Saudi SiC device engineers; pilot 4-inch SiC wafer fabrication line

partners.name: KACST Semiconductor Research
partners.current: Some semiconductor materials research; limited device research
partners.upgrade: GADD-KACST SiC research programme; SiC crystal characterisation; SiC device simulation and modelling; Saudi SiC process development

partners.name: Ma'aden / SABIC (SiC feedstock)
partners.current: Silicon raw materials; carbon-rich petrochemical streams
partners.upgrade: Saudi SiC crystal growth from SABIC silicon + carbon sources; Ma'aden SiC crystal programme; Saudi SiC substrate research using domestic feedstock

partners.name: KFUPM / KAUST Electrical Engineering
partners.upgrade: SiC power electronics engineering programme; SSIH-KFUPM SiC device research partnership; Saudi power semiconductor engineer pipeline
